# Agentic Workspace local chat checkpoint

Ignored local-only continuity checkpoint used to rehydrate a chat after compaction or resume without treating local notes as closure evidence.

- Source schema: `src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/local_chat_checkpoint.schema.json`
- Generated by: `scripts/generate/generate_schema_reference.py`

| `limits.local_only` | const `true` | yes |  | Checkpoint is only for the local workspace. |  |  |
| `limits.gitignored` | const `true` | yes |  | Checkpoint must remain in an ignored local path. |  |  |
| `limits.not_closure_evidence` | const `true` | yes |  | Checkpoint cannot prove issue or pull request closure. |  |  |
| `limits.no_raw_transcripts` | const `true` | yes |  | Checkpoint must not store raw chat transcript content. |  |  |
| `limits.no_secrets` | const `true` | yes |  | Checkpoint must not store secrets or authentication material. |  |  |
